source: Tax Foundation, 'How High Are Property Taxes in Your State?' (2024); Lincoln Institute Significant Features of the Property Tax. Numbers are effective property tax rates (annual tax owed / median home value).
rentCapRateNote: Renter pass-through is estimated as (effectiveRate / capRate) * annualRent. 6% is a standard residential cap rate; tier-1 metros run 4-5%, smaller markets 7-9%.
